zh.Lathom House, Lathom Par, Lancashire, En: 英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯
zh.Warrington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Culcheth於1245年出生在英國爾時，她的父親Gilbert de Culcheth41歲，母親Lady Cecelia de Lathom26歲。她於1287年與Adam Hindley在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Lathom House, Lathom Par, Lancashire, En: 英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯
zh-hans.Warrington, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Culcheth于1245年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Gilbert de Culcheth41岁，母亲Lady Cecelia de Lathom26岁。她于1287年与Adam Hindley在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Culcheth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Culcheth was born in 1245, in Cheshire, England, her father, Gilbert de Culcheth, was 41 and her mother, Lady Cecelia de Lathom, was 26. She married Adam Hindley in 1287, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died after 1290, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Culcheth est née en 1245, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Culcheth, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecelia de Lathom, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Adam Hindley en 1287, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1290, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Culcheth 1245 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Culcheth 41 und ihre Mutter Lady Cecelia de Lathom 26. Sie hat 1287 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Adam Hindley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1290 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Culcheth è nata il nel 1245 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, Gilbert de Culcheth, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Lady Cecelia de Lathom, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Adam Hindley nel 1287, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1290, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Culchethが1245年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Culchethは41歳，母Lady Cecelia de Lathomは26歳であった。1287年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでAdam Hindleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Culcheth(이)가 1245년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Culcheth(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Cecelia de Lathom(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Adam Hindley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Warrington, Lancashire, England: Warrington, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Culcheth nasceu em 1245, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Culcheth, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecelia de Lathom, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam Hindley em 1287, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1290, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Culcheth родилась в 1245 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Culcheth было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecelia de Lathom, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam Hindley в 1287 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1290 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Culcheth nació en 1245, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Culcheth, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Cecelia de Lathom, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Adam Hindley en 1287, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió después de 1290, en su pueblo.
